name: Color Pop
scaffolding_intent: Desaturates everything except the target to emphasize its visual attributes, scaffolding color adjectives and descriptive noun phrases

parameters.name: desaturationStrength
parameters.description: How much non-target pixels are desaturated

parameters.name: saturationBoost
parameters.description: How much to boost saturation of the active color group

correction_intent: Child described an incorrect property of an entity
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't described the properties of an entity
